headlines.title: Free bus trips for children in England this August as part of Reeves's cost-of-living plan
headlines.description: Chancellor Rachel Reeves will make a series of announcemenrs aimed at relieving cost-of-living pressures.

headlines.title: Chris Mason: Reeves' summer savings drive won't stretch to energy bills
headlines.description: The chancellor is announcing measures aimed at easing the cost of living - but no help yet with energy bills.

headlines.title: NHS trust sacks staff for accessing attacks victims' health records
headlines.description: Nottingham University Hospitals NHS Trust says investigations are ongoing.

headlines.title: EasyJet boss says summer flights won't be hit by jet fuel shortages
headlines.description: The airline has seen no problems with fuel, but says people are booking later because of uncertainty caused by the Iran war.

headlines.title: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says regulator
headlines.description: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.

headlines.title: Wes Streeting pledges wealth tax as part of leadership pitch
headlines.description: He proposes equalising capital gains tax with income tax, in a reform he estimates could raise £12bn a year.

headlines.title: Why illegal children's homes are being paid up to £2m per child by councils
headlines.description: A ban was meant to bring an end to the practice - but councils continue to fund illegal placements.

headlines.title: SpaceX files for stock market debut that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
headlines.description: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX

headlines.title: 'We'll go down in history' - Villa's new heroes triumph to end 30-year wait
headlines.description: Aston Villa beat Freiburg in Istanbul to win the Europa League, with a new generation of heroes etching their names in the history books.

headlines.title: Far-right Israeli minister condemned for taunting handcuffed Gaza flotilla activists
headlines.description: France and Italy are among the countries that have criticised a video showing Itamar Ben-Gvir taunting dozens of activists detained at an Israeli port.

headlines.title: I'm trapped in a retirement flat with a £20k service charge. I fear I'll never sell
headlines.description: Hundreds of people contacted BBC News after a report found families were being left with service charge debts after inheriting properties.

headlines.title: Race Across the World pals Jo and Kush on fame, friendship and family
headlines.description: The childhood best friends from Liverpool are the youngest duo in this series of the BBC show.

headlines.title: Watch: Why is the US going after Cuba's  Raúl Castro 30 years on?
headlines.description: BBC correspondent Will Grant reports from Havana, hours after the US charged former Cuban leader with conspiracy to kill US nationals and other crimes.

headlines.title: Meet the three Ellas racing through McLaren's F1 ranks
headlines.description: Ella Häkkinen, Ella Lloyd and Ella Stevens on horses, a Welsh dragon and their Rihanna-inspired nickname.

headlines.title: From AI to interceptors, Ukraine is trying to drone-proof its skies
headlines.description: After four years of Russia's full-scale invasion, Ukraine has become far more successful at fighting off air raids.

headlines.title: Sick walkers rescued after drinking river water on West Highland Way
headlines.description: Two walkers on the long distance route fell severely ill after drinking from a burn despite using filters.

headlines.title: UK agrees £3.7bn trade deal with six Gulf states
headlines.description: The deal will remove an estimated £580m worth of tariffs from British exports, but rights groups are critical

headlines.title: Driver who plunged 330ft down mountain pass was saved by phone's crash alert
headlines.description: Natalia Sidorska says she remains positive despite surviving the crash with life-changing injuries.

headlines.title: Burnham: 'People in Britain can't afford a good life'
headlines.description: Andy Burnham was speaking in a series of interviews with the candidates for the Makerfield by-election.

headlines.title: Green Party selects nurse as Makerfield candidate
headlines.description: Chris Kennedy was selected by local party members following a hustings.

headlines.title: Nvidia's record result fails to impress investors
headlines.description: The chip giant reported more stellar results but its shares fell after-hours as investors wonder if it can keep up its pace of growth amid greater competition.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Has The UK Softened Russia Oil Sanctions?
headlines.description: And fuel duty freeze extended to the end of the year

headlines.title: Trump gets 'forever' immunity on his past tax affairs
headlines.description: The US president's extraordinary new deal for himself and members of his family

headlines.title: 'We'll go down in history' - Villa's new heroes triumph to end 30-year wait
headlines.description: Aston Villa beat Freiburg in Istanbul to win the Europa League, with a new generation of heroes etching their names in the history books.

headlines.title: FA opens Southampton investigation over Spygate
headlines.description: The Football Association opens an investigation into Southampton's conduct after the club admit to spying on three clubs during the Championship season.

headlines.title: The World Cup squad dilemmas facing Tuchel
headlines.description: England manager Thomas Tuchel names his World Cup squad on Friday - although some of those not included already know their fate. What are the big decisions he has faced in selecting a final 26?

headlines.title: Secrets, acting & 16 years unbeaten - in camp with Usyk
headlines.description: Oleksandr Usyk tells BBC Sport about his "secret plan" for the future, possible moving into acting and how a defeat 16 years ago fuelled him on the path to greatness.

headlines.title: The 'F1 of athletics'? Athlos announces London debut
headlines.description: The all-female track meet Athlos will be hosted in London for the first time later this year as it expands to two events.

headlines.title: Weekly sports quiz: Who scored for Bruno Fernandes' 20th assist?
headlines.description: How much attention have you paid to what's happened in the world of sport over the past seven days?
